# feat(kaizen-observability): add TraceExporter with cross-SDK fingerprint parity

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `b278a5124e5a` — feat(kaizen-observability): add TraceExporter with cross-SDK fingerprint parity

**Body**:

Single-filter-point exporter for TraceEvent records. Each event is
stamped with the cross-SDK-locked SHA-256 fingerprint from
kailash.diagnostics.protocols.compute_trace_event_fingerprint (byte-
identical with kailash-rs#468 / v3.17.1+). Sinks are in-tree only
(JsonlSink, NoOpSink, CallableSink) — no Langfuse or other commercial
SDK coupling per rules/independence.md. Third parties wire their own
callable; the exporter never imports vendor SDKs.

PR#6 of issue #567 (MLFP diagnostics donation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
